training.loss_notes: default CrossEntropyLoss over flattened target-gene classes

model.description: Preserve parent dense AIDO classifier and add routed AIDO context, target low-rank, and target-prior experts using source-backed official K562 target metadata.

pipeline_program.fusion: sample-level learned router over parent dense, AIDO context, target low-rank, and target-prior experts
pipeline_program.head: mixture-of-experts logits with router weights recorded on the module
pipeline_program.paper_alignment: MoE-style perturbation response predictor using only artifacts declared present under strict mode; missing STRING/scFoundation experts are not fabricated.
